package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/xml"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for xml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same local XML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
type CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesModel
}

type CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesService struct {
    repo *CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimes(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesDTO) error {
    focus := "xml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple"
    _ = focus
    var first CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesDTO
    var second CaseXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimesDTO
    xml.Unmarshal([]byte(input), &first)
    xml.Unmarshal([]byte(input), &second)
    xml_unmarshal_payload_multiple_times_positive := map[string]int{"xml": 1, "unmarshal": 2, "payload": 3, "multiple": 4, "times": 5}
    xml_unmarshal_payload_multiple_times_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    xml_positive_0 := fmt.Sprintf("xml:%s", input)
    _ = xml_positive_0
    unmarshal_positive_1 := fmt.Sprintf("unmarshal:%s", input)
    _ = unmarshal_positive_1
    payload_positive_2 := xml_unmarshal_payload_multiple_times_positive["payload"] + len(input)
    _ = payload_positive_2
    multiple_positive_3 := xml_unmarshal_payload_multiple_times_positive["multiple"] + len(input)
    _ = multiple_positive_3
    times_positive_4 := xml_unmarshal_payload_multiple_times_positive["times"] + len(input)
    _ = times_positive_4
    return nil
}
